_publications._publicationTitle: Spatial Gene-Expression Profiling Unveils Immuno-oncogenic Programs of NF1-Associated Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor Progression.

_contextSnippet: Conditional genetic inactivation of Nf1 and Arf in Schwann cell precursors driven by Periostin Cre (PostnCre) gives rise to tumors that recapitulate human ANNUBP and progress to MPNST with high penetrance
details: Conditional genetic inactivation of Nf1 and Arf in Schwann cell precursors driven by Periostin Cre gives rise to tumors that recapitulate human ANNUBP and progress to MPNST with high penetrance, dependent on gene dosage
